name: ExtensionMedicinalProductDefinition_Name_Type
title: R5: Type of product name, such as rINN, BAN, Proprietary, Non-Proprietary (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicinalProductDefinition.name.type` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicinalProductDefinition.name.type` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.name.type` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `MedicinalProductDefinition.name.type` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.name.type` has a context of MedicinalProduct.name based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicinalProduct`.
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.name.type` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
